prestazioni: Engine swap to a Coventry Climax FPF 1.5L inline-4 (engine code: FPF 1500) with a forged crankshaft, billet connecting rods (Carillo), and forged pistons (JE 9.5:1 compression ratio) for a 180+ HP output at 7,000 RPM. Pair with a custom 4-into-1 equal-length stainless steel header (Schoenleber) and a 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system (Sebring) terminating in a single oval tip (Remus).

Close-ratio 5-speed manual transmission (Hewland LD200) with a limited-slip differential (Quaife ATB) and a lightweight flywheel (Tilton). Upgrade the clutch to a twin-plate ceramic unit (Spec Stage 4+) for improved engagement under high-RPM conditions.

Suspension overhaul with custom coilovers (Ohlins Road & Track DFV) featuring 24-way adjustable damping, adjustable camber plates (SuperPro), and polybushings (Whiteline) for the front A-arms. Install a front sway bar (Addco 1.125-inch) and a rear sway bar (Hotchkis 0.875-inch) to reduce body roll. Reinforce the chassis with a seam-welded roll cage (Custom Cages UK) and a front strut tower brace (Ultra Racing).
estetica: Full carbon fiber body panel replacement (Lotus Cars Heritage) including the hood, doors, and rear clamshell, finished in a custom metallic silver (Standox 9000 series) with hand-painted gold pinstriping (by Jason Hall).

Custom 15-inch magnesium wheels (Minilite replica by Image Wheels) in a 5.5J front and 6.5J rear configuration, wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (165/55R15 front, 185/55R15 rear). Add period-correct knock-off spinners (Radford) for authenticity.

Interior retrim with full Alcantara (Egger) upholstery, including the dashboard, door cards, and custom bucket seats (Sparco Pro 2000). Install a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub (NRG) and a custom aluminum shift knob (TWM) engraved with the Elite Type 14 logo. Add a digital dash (Aim MXS Strada) with a custom mounting bracket to retain the original gauge cluster aesthetic.
